title: mentha arvensis var. glaberrima
intro: Mentha arvensis var. glaberrima, also known as Japanese peppermint or wild mint, is a variety of mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and act as an antispasmodic agent. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. glaberrima include alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), reducing nausea and vomiting, and providing relief from headaches and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
